languages.text: "Зато, погибнув вместе со мной, эти знания не достанутся ксеносам. При угрозе компроментации исследований смерть предпочтительна усилению врагов Человечества".

"But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."
languages.original_text: "Зато, погибнув вместе со мной, эти знания не достанутся ксеносам. При угрозе компроментации исследований смерть предпочтительна усилению врагов Человечества".

traits.locale_text: "But my knowledge perishes with me, beyond the reach of the xenos. Given the threat of a research breach, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."
"But my knowledge perishes with me, beyond the reach of the xenos. Given the threat of a research breach, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

"But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

"But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

"But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

"But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

languages.text: "Aber wenn mein Wissen mit mir stirbt, fällt es nicht in die Hände der Xenos. Angesichts der Gefahr, dass meine Forschung kompromittiert wird, sterbe ich lieber, als die Feinde der Menschheit zu stärken."
languages.original_text: "But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Aber wenn mein Wissen mit mir stirbt, fällt es nicht in die Hände der Xenos. Angesichts der Gefahr, dass meine Forschung kompromittiert wird, sterbe ich lieber, als die Feinde der Menschheit zu stärken."

languages.text: « Si mes connaissances disparaissent avec moi, elles ne tomberont pas aux griffes de ce xénos. Je préfère mourir plutôt que de risquer de compromettre le fruit de mes recherches au profit des ennemis de l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Si mes connaissances disparaissent avec moi, elles ne tomberont pas aux griffes de ce xénos. Je préfère mourir plutôt que de risquer de compromettre le fruit de mes recherches au profit des ennemis de l'humanité. »

languages.text: «Pero, si mi conocimiento perece conmigo, no caerá en manos de los xenos. Dada la probabilidad de que mi investigación haya sido comprometida, la muerte es preferible a reforzar a los enemigos de la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Pero, si mi conocimiento perece conmigo, no caerá en manos de los xenos. Dada la probabilidad de que mi investigación haya sido comprometida, la muerte es preferible a reforzar a los enemigos de la Humanidad».

languages.text: "Fakat bilgi birikimim benimle birlikte yok olursa zenonun pençelerine düşmemiş olur. Araştırmamın tehlikeye atılma riski göz önüne alındığında ölüm, İnsanlığın düşmanlarını güçlendirmekten daha iyidir."
languages.original_text: "But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Fakat bilgi birikimim benimle birlikte yok olursa zenonun pençelerine düşmemiş olur. Araştırmamın tehlikeye atılma riski göz önüne alındığında ölüm, İnsanlığın düşmanlarını güçlendirmekten daha iyidir."

languages.text: “可如果我的知识随我一同消亡，那它至少不会落入异形之手。考虑到研究有泄露的风险，那与其助长人类之敌，死亡反而是更好的选择。”
languages.original_text: "But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: “可如果我的知识随我一同消亡，那它至少不会落入异形之手。考虑到研究有泄露的风险，那与其助长人类之敌，死亡反而是更好的选择。”

languages.text: 「しかし、私の知識が私もろとも滅びるならば、それは異種族の手に落ちることもありません。私の研究が漏洩する危険を思えば、人類の敵を強大にするくらいなら、死のほうが望ましいのです」
languages.original_text: "But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、私の知識が私もろとも滅びるならば、それは異種族の手に落ちることもありません。私の研究が漏洩する危険を思えば、人類の敵を強大にするくらいなら、死のほうが望ましいのです」
